# Fantastic-admin

> 杰出的管理系统框架

开箱即用，提供舒适开发体验

### 内建组件

#### 基础版

- [OcDivider 分割线](/components/basic/OcDivider.md)
- [OcDrawer 抽屉](/components/basic/OcDrawer.md)
- [OcDropdown 下拉菜单](/components/basic/OcDropdown.md)
- [OcFileUpload 文件上传](/components/basic/OcFileUpload.md)

- [OcIcon 图标](/components/basic/OcIcon.md)
- [OcImagePreview 图片预览](/components/basic/OcImagePreview.md)
- [OcImageUpload 图片上传](/components/basic/OcImageUpload.md)
- [OcInput 输入框](/components/basic/OcInput.md)

- [OcKbd 键盘按键](/components/basic/OcKbd.md)
- [OcKbdGroup 键盘组合](/components/basic/OcKbdGroup.md)
- [OcLabel 标签](/components/basic/OcLabel.md)
- [OcModal 对话框](/components/basic/OcModal.md)
- [OcNumberField 数字输入框](/components/basic/OcNumberField.md)
- [OcPageHeader 页面头部](/components/basic/OcPageHeader.md)
- [OcPageMain 页面主内容区](/components/basic/OcPageMain.md)
- [OcPagination 分页](/components/basic/OcPagination.md)
- [OcPasswordStrength 密码强度](/components/basic/OcPasswordStrength.md)
- [OcPopover 弹出框](/components/basic/OcPopover.md)
- [OcProgress 进度条](/components/basic/OcProgress.md)
- [OcRadioGroup 单选组](/components/basic/OcRadioGroup.md)
- [OcScrollArea 滚动区域](/components/basic/OcScrollArea.md)
- [OcSearchBar 搜索栏](/components/basic/OcSearchBar.md)

- [OcSlider 滑块](/components/basic/OcSlider.md)
